global_rules.spacing_system: Dense layout: p-4 to p-6 for panels, gap-4 to gap-6 for grids. Follow 'Control Room Grid' protocol.
global_rules.shadows: None. Rely on 1px borders for separation to maintain a flat, technical aesthetic.
global_rules.animations: Minimal. Focus on micro-interactions (hover states, focus rings). No bouncy or slow transitions.

layout_patterns.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
layout_patterns.panel: bg-[#1a1c23] border border-[#2d313a] rounded-md p-4 md:p-6 flex flex-col
layout_patterns.navigation: Left sidebar (w-64) with dense link list, or slim rail (w-16). Top header for breadcrumbs and global actions.
layout_patterns.f_pattern_hierarchy: Top row spans full width or large cols for primary metrics. Subsequent rows break into smaller widgets.

components.buttons: Flat, rounded-md, no shadows. Use 'data-testid' for all buttons.
components.cards: Strictly functional. border-[#2d313a] bg-[#1a1c23]. Header has border-b.
components.log_viewer: Must use 'JetBrains Mono'. Black background (#000000 or #0a0a0a) inside the panel, line numbers on the left. Syntax highlighting based on severity (ERROR=red, WARN=orange).
components.badges: Small, rounded-full or rounded-sm, using status colors. text-[10px] uppercase font-bold tracking-wider.
components.relationship_graph: Use flex/grid layouts with Tailwind border lines and pseudo-elements or SVG arrows to connect nodes. Nodes are small cards.
components.ai_summary: Accordion or Collapsible component, closed by default. Subdued styling.

icons.style: stroke-2, size-4 or size-5. Keep them functional, not decorative.

images.description: Subtle dark abstract pattern to be used with high opacity overlay (bg-[#0f1117]/90) on the upload page background if needed.

media.logos: Use Lucide React 'Activity', 'Terminal', or 'Cpu' icon combined with text 'Deployment Doctor' as the brand logo.

pages_instructions.UploadPage: Center the drag-and-drop zone. Make it look like a terminal or technical dropzone. Dashed borders with hover states. Include file size limits and constraints clearly.
pages_instructions.ReportPage: High data density. The top should have a 'Confidence Score' gauge or large number. The 'Root Cause' should be the most prominent text. 'Verification Commands' should look like terminal copy-paste blocks.
pages_instructions.DemoCenter: Grid of cards. Each card represents a log scenario. Use clear titles and severity badges on each card.
pages_instructions.IncidentKnowledgeBase: A dense data table. Columns: Rule ID, Pattern, Severity, Category, Actions. Use Shadcn Table.

accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs) MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='upload-log-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text against #0f1117 and #1a1c23 meets WCAG AA standards. Use text-slate-100 for primary text.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the incident relationship graph using raw HTML/Tailwind. Do not install ReactFlow.
Ensure all panels have 'border border-[#2d313a] bg-[#1a1c23] rounded-md'.
Do not use generic Shadcn default styles; override them to match this dark theme.
